scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w api && npm run test:coverage -w web
scripts.test:coverage:ci: npm run test:coverage:ci -w api && npm run test:coverage:ci -w web
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
scripts.dev:e2e: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w api" "wait-on -t 120000 -i 500 http://127.0.0.1:3000/health && npm run dev -w web -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 --strictPort"
